name: visualize
description: Build single-file, self-contained HTML artifacts as scaffolding for the conversation — comparison grids, dashboards, plan pages, decision matrices, kanbans, slide decks, mockups, ERDs, timelines, reference docs — when the answer wants to be a page you can scroll, click, and share. No house template; aesthetic anchors (editorial, ops-terminal, pitch-display, whimsy-kitchen, brutalist-newsprint, etc.) guide taste calibration so artifacts don't all collapse into default-modern-SaaS. Mermaid, SVG, Chart.js, and Reveal.js are CDN primitives reached for only when the shape needs them.
